title: puccinellia laevis
intro: Puccinellia laevis, also known as Smooth Wheatgrass or Slender Brome, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is native to the temperate regions of Europe, Asia, and North Africa. Puccinellia laevis has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves and stems can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which may provide health benefits including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health.
